title: StatefulSet Basics — Deleting StatefulSets
text:
StatefulSet supports both
non-cascading
and
cascading
deletion. In a
non-cascading
delete
, the StatefulSet's Pods are not deleted when the
StatefulSet is deleted. In a cascading
delete
, both the StatefulSet and
its Pods are deleted.
Read
Use Cascading Deletion in a Cluster
to learn about cascading deletion generally.
